rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §273.004 governs examination of impoundedelection records. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 273.004. EXAMINATION OF IMPOUNDED RECORDS. (a) The examination of impounded election records shall be conducted in the same manner as a court of inquiry.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption change and election record impoundment statute.
